overrides.value: Linienmanager + Betriebsrat
overrides.reason: German Works Council (Betriebsrat) co-determination requires employee representation in access decisions per BDSG §32

overrides.value: IT-Team gewährt genehmigten Zugriff unter BDSG-Datenschutzkonformität und Protokollierungspflicht
overrides.reason: BDSG requires documented access grants with audit trails and data protection compliance

overrides.value: Vierteljährliche Zugriffsberechtigungskontrolle mit Betriebsratbeteiligung
overrides.reason: German data protection law requires Works Council involvement in access reviews

description.default: Formal notification to Works Council of all access changes per Mitbestimmung rights

translations.de: Formelle Benachrichtigung des Betriebsrats über alle Zugriffsänderungen gemäß Mitbestimmungsrechten

additional_risks.description: Dual approval delays causing business process bottlenecks during critical periods
Works Council objections to system access based on employee protection concerns

notes.default: German market requires Works Council co-determination and enhanced data protection documentation per BDSG

translations.de: Deutscher Markt erfordert Betriebsrat-Mitbestimmung und erweiterte Datenschutzdokumentation gemäß BDSG

overrides.value: Usuário solicita acesso através do portal com validação CPF e biometria facial
overrides.reason: Brazilian LGPD requires strong identity verification with CPF integration and biometric validation

overrides.value: Gestor + Comitê de Privacidade LGPD
overrides.reason: LGPD Article 19 requires privacy committee involvement in access decisions

overrides.value: Equipe de TI concede acesso com registro obrigatório em LGPD audit trail
overrides.reason: LGPD mandates comprehensive audit trails for all data processing activities

description.default: Cross-reference CPF with government database and validate identity documents

translations.pt: Referência cruzada de CPF com banco de dados governamental e validação de documentos de identidade

description.default: Report high-risk access grants to National Data Protection Authority

translations.pt: Reportar concessões de acesso de alto risco à Autoridade Nacional de Proteção de Dados

additional_risks.description: Shared credential culture among Brazilian employees leading to unauthorized access
CPF fraud attempts in access requests using stolen or synthetic identities

notes.default: Brazilian market requires LGPD compliance, CPF integration, and addresses shared credential cultural practices

translations.pt: Mercado brasileiro requer conformidade LGPD, integração CPF e aborda práticas culturais de credenciais compartilhadas

overrides.value: 上長がアクセス要求を承認、ハンコと電子署名の両方を必要
overrides.reason: Japanese business culture requires both physical hanko stamps and digital signatures for formal approvals

overrides.value: ITチームが承認されたアクセスを付与、J-SOX文書化要件を満たす
overrides.reason: J-SOX requires comprehensive documentation and segregation of duties evidence

overrides.value: 要求者 + 部門長
overrides.reason: Japanese hierarchical structure requires department head involvement in verification

description.default: Physical hanko stamp application on access request forms for legal validity

translations.ja: アクセス要求フォームへの物理的な判子押印による法的有効性

description.default: Create J-SOX compliance documentation for all access changes

translations.ja: すべてのアクセス変更についてJ-SOXコンプライアンス文書を作成

additional_risks.description: Hanko stamp delays causing access provisioning bottlenecks during month-end closing
Cultural reluctance to question superior access requests leading to inappropriate permissions

notes.default: Japanese market requires hanko stamp approvals, J-SOX documentation, and addresses hierarchical cultural dynamics

translations.ja: 日本市場は判子承認、J-SOX文書化、階層的文化ダイナミクスへの対応が必要

overrides.value: Line manager reviews and approves access request with SOX 404 control validation
overrides.reason: US SOX 404 requires manager attestation on access controls and segregation of duties

overrides.value: IT team grants access with NIST 800-53 compliance logging and audit trail
overrides.reason: NIST 800-53 mandates comprehensive audit trails and access control documentation

overrides.value: Quarterly Access Review with SOX Attestation
overrides.reason: SOX 404 requires quarterly management attestation on control effectiveness

description.default: Perform quarterly SOX control testing on access management processes
Validate access controls against NIST 800-53 requirements quarterly

additional_risks.description: SOX 404 material weakness findings from inadequate access control documentation
State-specific data privacy law violations (CCPA, NYDFS, etc.) in access management

notes.default: US market requires SOX 404 compliance, NIST 800-53 alignment, and addresses multi-state privacy law complexity

overrides.value: उपयोगकर्ता सेल्फ-सर्विस पोर्टल के माध्यम से एक्सेस अनुरोध करता है, Aadhaar और PAN के साथ पहचान
overrides.reason: Indian IT Act and Aadhaar integration require government ID verification for digital access

overrides.value: प्रबंधक + डेटा सुरक्षा अधिकारी (DPO)
overrides.reason: India's Personal Data Protection Bill requires DPO involvement in access decisions

overrides.value: त्रैमासिक एक्सेस समीक्षा और SEPI अनुपालन
overrides.reason: SEBI and RBI regulations require quarterly access reviews for financial systems

description.default: Verify Aadhaar-PAN linkage and cross-reference with government databases

translations.hi: आधार-पैन लिंक सत्यापन और सरकारी डेटाबेस के साथ क्रॉस-रेफरेंस

description.default: Validate access compliance with RBI and SEBI regulations for financial systems

translations.hi: वित्तीय प्रणालियों के लिए आरबीआई और सेबी विनियमों के साथ एक्सेस अनुपालन की पुष्टि करें

additional_risks.description: Disconnected plant systems in manufacturing facilities with no central access management
Aadhaar authentication failures during access requests due to system connectivity issues

notes.default: Indian market requires Aadhaar/PAN integration, SEBI/RBI compliance, and addresses disconnected plant system challenges

translations.hi: भारतीय बाजार को आधार/पैन एकीकरण, सेबी/आरबीआई अनुपालन और डिस्कनेक्टेड प्लांट सिस्टम चुनौतियों को संबोधित करने की आवश्यकता है

overrides.value: Line manager reviews and approves access request with GDPR DPIA consideration
overrides.reason: UK GDPR requires Data Protection Impact Assessment for high-risk access grants

overrides.value: IT team grants access with FCA record-keeping and ICO audit trail requirements
overrides.reason: FCA handbook and ICO guidelines require comprehensive access documentation

overrides.value: Quarterly Access Review with ICO Reporting
overrides.reason: UK ICO requires documented access reviews with breach reporting capability

description.default: Validate access controls against FCA Senior Management Arrangements Principles
Conduct GDPR Data Protection Impact Assessment for high-risk access

additional_risks.description: Brexit-related data transfer complications in cross-border access management
FCA regulatory action for inadequate access control systems in financial institutions

notes.default: UK market requires GDPR/FCA overlay compliance, addresses Brexit data transfer challenges, and enhanced regulatory reporting

overrides.value: 用户通过自服务门户申请访问，需进行实名认证和政府身份验证
overrides.reason: China's Cybersecurity Law requires real-name verification and government ID authentication

overrides.value: 直线经理 + 网络安全办公室
overrides.reason: Chinese Cybersecurity Law requires cybersecurity office involvement in access decisions

overrides.value: IT团队授予访问权限，需符合网络安全法数据本地化要求
overrides.reason: China's data localization laws require access controls to enforce data residency

description.default: Verify real-name identity against government database and mobile number registration

translations.zh: 根据政府数据库和手机号码注册验证实名身份

additional_steps.responsible_role: 网络安全管理员 + 公安系统对接

description.default: Ensure access complies with Chinese data localization and cross-border transfer restrictions

translations.zh: 确保访问符合中国数据本地化和跨境传输限制

additional_steps.responsible_role: 数据保护官 + 网安办

additional_risks.description: Government surveillance requirements conflicting with corporate data protection policies
Data localization enforcement causing system architecture constraints for multinational companies

notes.default: Chinese market requires real-name authentication, data localization compliance, and addresses government surveillance requirements

translations.zh: 中国市场需要实名认证、数据本地化合规，并解决政府监控要求

overrides.value: Manager + CIL (Correspondant Informatique et Libertés)
overrides.reason: French CNIL requires Data Protection Officer involvement in access decisions

overrides.value: L'équipe IT accorde l'accès avec conformité RGPD et journalisation CNIL
overrides.reason: French CNIL requires GDPR compliance with specific French adaptations and audit trails

overrides.value: Revue trimestrielle d'accès avec validation CNIL
overrides.reason: CNIL requires documented access reviews with French data protection considerations

description.default: Data Protection Officer review and validation of high-risk access requests

translations.fr: Examen et validation par le Correspondant Informatique et Libertés des demandes d'accès à haut risque

description.default: Ensure access controls comply with French labor code employee monitoring restrictions

translations.fr: Assurer que les contrôles d'accès respectent les restrictions de surveillance des employés du Code du travail français

additional_risks.description: French labor code restrictions on employee monitoring affecting access control logging
CNIL enforcement actions for inadequate data protection in access management systems

notes.default: French market requires CNIL compliance, CIL involvement, and addresses labor code monitoring restrictions

translations.fr: Le marché français exige la conformité CNIL, l'implication du CIL et aborde les restrictions de surveillance du Code du travail

overrides.value: Line manager reviews and approves access request with Privacy Act consideration
overrides.reason: Australian Privacy Act 1988 requires privacy impact assessment for access decisions

overrides.value: IT team grants access with ASIC compliance logging and OAIC audit trail
overrides.reason: ASIC requirements and OAIC guidelines mandate comprehensive access documentation

overrides.value: Quarterly Access Review with OAIC Reporting
overrides.reason: OAIC requires documented access reviews with breach reporting capability

description.default: Validate access controls against ASIC regulatory requirements for financial services
Assess access changes for potential notifiable data breach implications

additional_risks.description: Cross-border data transfer complications with US-based systems under Privacy Act
ASIC regulatory action for inadequate access control systems in financial institutions

notes.default: Australian market requires Privacy Act/ASIC compliance, addresses cross-border data transfers, and enhanced breach reporting

overrides.value: Line manager reviews and approves access request with PIPEDA privacy assessment
overrides.reason: Canadian PIPEDA requires privacy impact assessment for access decisions

overrides.value: IT team grants access with provincial privacy law compliance and audit trail
overrides.reason: Canada has multiple provincial privacy laws requiring compliance documentation

overrides.value: Quarterly Access Review with Provincial Compliance
overrides.reason: Provincial privacy commissioners require documented access reviews

description.default: Validate access compliance across provincial privacy laws (Quebec, Alberta, BC)
Conduct PIPEDA compliance assessment for cross-border data access

additional_risks.description: Provincial privacy law variations causing compliance complexity across Canadian operations
PIPEDA breach reporting requirements for access control system failures

notes.default: Canadian market requires PIPEDA/provincial privacy law compliance, addresses multi-jurisdictional complexity, and enhanced breach reporting
